positive: Stylized minimalist illustration of a celestial forest clearing at twilight. A central silhouette of a group of whimsical, abstract forest spirits are interacting with glowing, bioluminescent flora and crystalline mushrooms. The scene must feature strong, high-contrast color blocking in deep indigo, cosmic violet, mint green, and ethereal gold. The overall style should be sophisticated linework mixed with watercolor washes, optimized for screen printing on fabric. Ensure the main subjects are highly legible against the background, forming a cohesive, repeating pattern element. Perfect symmetry and central composition. No deep background clutter, keep the focus on the figures and stylized plants.
